title: launaea lackii
intro: Launaea lackii is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family, Asteraceae. Traditionally, Launaea lackii has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Launaea lackii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Launaea lackii is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
